07 December 2009 12:05:00 PM

FAURE_PRB
  C++ version

  Test the routines in the FAURE library.

TEST01
  FAURE computes the next element of a Faure sequence.

  In this test, we call FAURE repeatedly.

  Using dimension DIM_NUM =   4
  The underlying base is QS = 5

  Seed  Seed   Faure
